text.message: Mm i can leave u brick if u want
Ah thought bc u wanted the 6 wood
so we're just leaving red goated
if you didn't want it I would have taken it
What would you have done in my place?
I asked you if you were going 6 9 12 8 10
How on earth is that winning
I would have played it with third.
now red kinda gets an unstoppable setup
Nothing is unstoppable, we just gotta work together if needed
Green lmk if you want ore or wood
We cannot give brick ro oj
He has best ows by far
Been helping u out green, thought our friendship was rock solid
your uncontested road and port and city are scary
I was dumb racing for the brick port I should have just gone 8 10 from under
Oj can just double play now
Oj so lucky w so many knights to pin the 6
But red still goes for me
And then takes my road, no sense
U should be popping red, u cant fight road
do you take road with this?
I have wood he has brick
Its oj now w open settle
